output.code:
text = open('/mnt/data/file-6NMmk8pRncZCEMHXjavT7n-text_to_analyse.txt','rb').read().decode('utf-8')
print(len(text))
print(repr(text[:200]))
# find the hadith matn: locate the colon after "قال رسول"
idx = text.find('قال رسول')
print('pos قال رسول', idx)
# find colon after صلى...:
col = text.find(':', idx)
start = col+1
# Now we need to trim leading spaces and quotes per rules
raw_matn = text[start:].strip()
# But must exclude surrounding quotes at start (there is initial quote mark)
print(repr(text[start:start+5]))
# Remove leading quotation marks and spaces
# Let's find exact matn start by locating "إن الله"
matn_phrase = 'إن الله'
matn_pos = text.find(matn_phrase, start)
matn_pos, text[matn_pos:matn_pos+200]

import re
span = text[matn_pos:len(text)]
# trim leading/trailing specified chars
trim_chars = r'"\s\.\,\!\?\:\;\،\؛\(\)\[\]\{\}\<\>ـ…\n\r\t'
span_trimmed = re.sub(r'^[%s]+'%trim_chars, '', span)
span_trimmed = re.sub(r'[%s]+$'%trim_chars, '', span_trimmed)
len(span_trimmed), span_trimmed[:200], span_trimmed[-50:]
